title: NoBedrock
description: This resource pack is meant as an add-on to "NoOres". It will change the texture of bedrock blocks to deepslate to blend it into the terrain and avoid people using bedrock reversal to find your location
body: This resource pack is meant as an add-on to the "NoOres" pack. It will replace the texture of bedrock blocks with the normal deepslate texture to blend it in. This is meant to be used to avoid people from using bedrock reversal to find your position
